title: S3 bucket has acl set to public-read.
evidence: The bucket's contents can be read by any unauthenticated user.
fix_recipe: Set acl = "private" and use bucket policies for narrow access.

title: IAM policy document uses wildcard actions.
evidence: Overly permissive policy grants unintended access.
fix_recipe: Replace "*" with specific IAM actions scoped to the task.

title: Security group allows ingress from 0.0.0.0/0 on port 22.
evidence: SSH accessible to the entire internet.
fix_recipe: Restrict cidr_blocks to known admin CIDRs or use a bastion/SSM Session Manager.

title: RDS instance does not have storage_encrypted set.
evidence: Data at rest is stored unencrypted.
fix_recipe: Set storage_encrypted = true on the aws_db_instance resource.

title: Ensure no hard-coded secrets exist in provider blocks
evidence: provider.aws: Ensure no hard-coded secrets exist in provider blocks

title: Ensure that S3 bucket has a lifecycle configuration to disable public read-write
evidence: aws_s3_bucket_acl.exposed: Ensure that S3 bucket has a lifecycle configuration to disable public read-write

title: Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's actions
evidence: aws_iam_policy.wildcard: Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's actions
